initial_program:
% Determine the number of rows and columns
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(R) :- n_rows(N), R = 0..N-1.
col(C) :- n_cols(M), C = 0..M-1.
output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).

% Guess the two distinct nonzero cells (R1,C1,V1) and (R2,C2,V2)
1 { R1, C1, V1, R2, C2, V2 : input(R1,C1,V1), input(R2,C2,V2),
       V1 != V2, R1 < R2, C1 < C2 } 1 :- true.

% Orientation facts
rowPattern1 :- (R2 - R1) > 0, (R2 - R1) < (C2 - C1).
rowPattern0 :- (C2 - C1) = 0, (R2 - R1) > 0.
colPattern1 :- (C2 - C1) > 0, (C2 - C1) < (R2 - R1).
colPattern0 :- (R2 - R1) = 0, (C2 - C1) > 0.

% Placement conditions
condV1_row(R) :- (R - R1) \ ((R2 - R1) * 2) = 0.
condV2_row(R) :- (R - R2) \ ((R2 - R1) * 2) = 0.
condV1_col(C) :- (C - C1) \ ((C2 - C1) * 2) = 0.
condV2_col(C) :- (C - C2) \ ((C2 - C1) * 2) = 0.

% Allowed colours for each cell
allowed(R,C,V1) :- rowPattern1, condV1_row(R), Color = V1.
allowed(R,C,V1) :- colPattern1, condV1_col(C), Color = V1.
allowed(R,C,V1) :- colPattern0, condV1_col(C), Color = V1.

allowed(R,C,V2) :- rowPattern1, condV2_row(R), Color = V2.
allowed(R,C,V2) :- colPattern1, condV2_col(C), Color = V2.
allowed(R,C,V2) :- colPattern0, condV2_col(C), Color = V2.

allowed(R,C,0) :- rowPattern0, not condV1_row(R), not condV2_row(R), Color = 0.
allowed(R,C,0) :- colPattern0, not condV1_col(C), not condV2_col(C), Color = 0.

% Choose exactly one colour for each output cell, respecting the allowed predicate
1 { output(R, C, Col) : color(Col) } 1 :- allowed(R, C, Col), output_cell(R, C).

#show output/3.

% Determine the number of rows and columns
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(R) :- n_rows(N), R = 0..N-1.
col(C) :- n_cols(M), C = 0..M-1.
output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).

pair(R1,C1,V1,R2,C2,V2) :- true.
1 { pair(R1,C1,V1,R2,C2,V2) : input(R1,C1,V1), input(R2,C2,V2), V1 != V2, R1 < R2, C1 < C2 } 1 :- true.
% Orientation facts
% Orientation facts
rowPattern1 :- (R2 - R1) > 0, (R2 - R1) < (C2 - C1).
rowPattern0 :- (C2 - C1) = 0, (R2 - R1) > 0.
colPattern1 :- (C2 - C1) > 0, (C2 - C1) < (R2 - R1).
colPattern0 :- (R2 - R1) = 0, (C2 - C1) > 0.

% Placement conditions
condV1_row(R) :- (R - R1) \ ((R2 - R1) * 2) = 0.
condV2_row(R) :- (R - R2) \ ((R2 - R1) * 2) = 0.
condV1_col(C) :- (C - C1) \ ((C2 - C1) * 2) = 0.
condV2_col(C) :- (C - C2) \ ((C2 - C1) * 2) = 0.

% Allowed colours for each cell
allowed(R,C,V1) :- rowPattern1, condV1_row(R), Color = V1.
allowed(R,C,V1) :- colPattern1, condV1_col(C), Color = V1.
allowed(R,C,V1) :- colPattern0, condV1_col(C), Color = V1.

allowed(R,C,V2) :- rowPattern1, condV2_row(R), Color = V2.
allowed(R,C,V2) :- colPattern1, condV2_col(C), Color = V2.
allowed(R,C,V2) :- colPattern0, condV2_col(C), Color = V2.

allowed(R,C,0) :- rowPattern0, not condV1_row(R), not condV2_row(R), Color = 0.
allowed(R,C,0) :- colPattern0, not condV1_col(C), not condV2_col(C), Color = 0.

% Choose exactly one colour for each output cell, respecting the allowed predicate
1 { output(R, C, Col) : color(Col) } 1 :- allowed(R, C, Col), output_cell(R, C).

#show output/3.

n_cols(M) :- M = #count{C : input(_, C, _)}.

% Input and bounds
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{R : input(R, _, _)}.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{C : input(_, C, _)}.
row(R) :- n_rows(N), R = 0..N-1.
col(C) :- n_cols(M), C = 0..M-1.
output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).

% Bind guess variables
bind_R1 :- row(R1).
bind_C1 :- col(C1).
bind_R2 :- row(R2).
bind_C2 :- col(C2).
bind_V1 :- V1 > 0.
bind_V2 :- V2 > 0.

% Guess two distinct nonzero cells
guess(R1,C1,V1,R2,C2,V2) :- input(R1,C1,V1), input(R2,C2,V2), V1 != V2, R1 < R2, C1 < C2.

% Allowed colours
allowed_v1(R,C) :- RowPattern1, condV1_row(R), ColPattern1, condV1_col(C).
allowed_v2(R,C) :- RowPattern1, condV2_row(R), ColPattern1, condV2_col(C).
allowed_0(R,C) :- RowPattern0, colPattern0, (R - R1) \ ((R2 - R1) * 2) != 0, (R - R2) \ ((R2 - R1) * 2) != 0, (C - C1) \ ((C2 - C1) * 2) != 0, (C - C2) \ ((C2 - C1) * 2) != 0.

% Choose exactly one colour for each output cell
1 { output(R, C, 0) : true } 1 :- allowed_0(R, C), output_cell(R, C).
1 { output(R, C, V1) : true } 1 :- allowed_v1(R, C), output_cell(R, C).
1 { output(R, C, V2) : true } 1 :- allowed_v2(R, C), output_cell(R, C).

#show output/3.
